betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Powered Drill§f is an electric mining tool for efficient excavation.

§eAdvantages:§f
• Faster than manual picks
• Battery-powered operation
• No durability loss (while powered)

§eOperation:§f
• Charge battery
• Mine faster than manual tools
• Works on most materials

§aTip:§f Keep spare batteries for extended mining sessions.
